2199900.name: Fantasy Grounds - Savage Rifts(R): The Tomorrow Legion Archetypes - Set 1 #SWADE
2199900.description:
Savage Rifts(R): The Tomorrow Legion Archetypes - Set 1 #SWADE

Get to the action faster using our pregenerated Archetype characters, now including an Advancement track!
These ready-to-play archetypes for Savage Rifts(R) are formatted in character sheet format, feature expanded rules references, background information, and include the following:
  • Cyber-Knight
  • Glitter Boy
  • Juicer
  • Ley  Line Walker
  • Mind Melter
  • City Rat
This product requires the
Savage Worlds Adventure Edition core rules,
Rifts(R): The Tomorrow Legion Player's Guide (Second Edition) , and
Rifts(R): Game Master's Handbook (Second Edition) to play.
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Joe Collins
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and a one time purchase of the Savage Worlds Adventure Edition ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
